purpose: Formal/checker target registry. These are obligations for Python/Sage/Z3/Lean or related tools; they are not solved unless a result record is added.

targets.predicate: Generated Matryoshka containment poset agrees with expected face-lattice order for small n and with theorem statement as source authority.
targets.failure_condition: A generated Matryoshka cover relation does not match the expected refinement/containment order, or a face-label mapping is not anti-isomorphic.

targets.predicate: Primitive cover moves in cosmohedron finite baselines split into more than one move class, unlike current A/M1 baselines.
targets.failure_condition: Cosmohedron primitive cover moves collapse to one class under the chosen equivalence, or A/M1 show matching multiplicity under the same equivalence.

targets.predicate: delta_P + delta_P' <= delta_union + delta_intersection is represented with the correct domain conventions, including delta_full = 0.
targets.failure_condition: The encoded law permits a violating assignment under declared positivity/domain constraints, or union/intersection conventions are inconsistent.

targets.checker_layer: Z3/Python typed predicate model; later Lean
targets.predicate: Classify equality status as intrinsic/native vs degenerative/saturation based on whether equality is part of the family definition or arises only by imposing extra constraints on a generic inequality layer.
targets.failure_condition: The source-bound definitions do not support the intrinsic/degenerative distinction, or the distinction is representation-dependent.

targets.predicate: Facet/cover descent in the associahedron baseline proceeds by adding/removing one compatible chord, yielding unit codimension steps.
targets.failure_condition: Generated noncrossing chord poset contains a cover changing more than one chord under the chosen grading.

targets.checker_layer: Python finite sign-vector enumeration; later Lean
targets.predicate: Boundary/descent steps in the m=1 sign-flip family are represented by unit changes in sign/vector boundary data within declared scope.
targets.failure_condition: A cover/descent relation changes non-unit rank or requires an extra hidden move class under the formal sign-family model.

targets.predicate: For extracted curve sets, u_C + product_D u_D^{#int(C,D)} = 1 is encoded with the correct intersection exponents, and surfaceology extensions preserve the declared curve-integral interface where claimed.
targets.failure_condition: A curve set has missing/interpreted intersection data, equation exponents do not match source-defined intersection numbers, or an extension claim lacks the needed curve-integral interface.

targets.predicate: In positive region, u_C >= 0 plus u-equations force 0 <= u_C <= 1 and incompatible crossing variables approach 1 when u_C -> 0.
targets.failure_condition: The encoded positive-region equations admit u outside [0,1] or fail incompatible-boundary behavior under source assumptions.

targets.predicate: The scaffolded-gluon kinematic shift, hidden-zero bridge, and W_e/transmutation claims are represented as source-bound bridge claims without promoting them to equivalence of realization classes.
targets.failure_condition: The shift/transmutation bridge is incomplete, index partition is inconsistent, or a bridge is promoted to realization equivalence without a separate comparator proof.

targets.predicate: Any comparator relying on boundary structure, logarithmic form, positivity, or bootstrap success alone must mark same-boundary/different-bulk or post-integration-caution risk as unresolved unless bulk/equivalence evidence is separately checked.
targets.failure_condition: A realization equivalence is inferred from same boundary/log-form/positivity/bootstrap data without explicit bulk or representation equivalence evidence.

targets.checker_layer: Typed representation-map ledger first; later symbolic/spinor-helicity checks
targets.predicate: Momentum and loop-momentum amplituhedron claims are carried as representation-comparator records, separating same-physics claims from equality of geometric realization class.
targets.failure_condition: A spinor-helicity or loop-momentum presentation is treated as the same realization class as the momentum-twistor amplituhedron without an explicit representation map and boundary/bulk compatibility check.

targets.checker_layer: implemented source-coverage validator; later Lean/formal residue model
targets.predicate: Canonical-form source claims include boundary-only logarithmic singularity and recursive residue-on-boundary-to-canonical-form-on-boundary conditions.
targets.failure_condition: The extracted source support does not include both boundary singularity and recursive residue conditions, or the claim is generalized beyond the source scope.

targets.predicate: S2* readout support may cite positive-geometry canonical-boundary recursion, scattering forms, and amplituhedron cuts/faces only as partial source coverage, not as checked substrate realization.
targets.failure_condition: S2* is promoted to checked or physical substrate status without a separate validator/proof artifact.

targets.checker_layer: source-coverage validator first; later finite examples
targets.predicate: Triangulation/push-forward methods are recorded as canonical-form construction methods, not as formation-medium dynamics or substrate settling laws.
targets.failure_condition: Triangulation or push-forward source language is promoted into a physical formation or settling law without additional evidence.
